dct_title_s: [Series of maps of the Holy Land]
dct_description_sm: engr. by L. Lipmann ; drawn by H. Kiepert.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Bar scales on maps given in "Geographical miles", "Roman miles", "Engl. geogr. miles", and "Engl. feet".
Shows topography, drainage, roads, travel routes, places of historical interest.
Map [6] inset maps: Region between Cairo and Suez -- Plan of Petra from Laborde.

[1] Notice -- [2] Plan of Jerusalem originally sketched from Sieber and Catherwood : corrected by the measurements of Robinson and Smith : the streets corrected from the plans of Tobler and the English engineers / engr. by L. Lipmann -- [3] Environs of Jerusalem from the routes and observations of Robinson and Smith / engr. by L. Lipmann -- [4] Map of southern Palestine : chiefly from the routes of E. Robinson & others / drawn by H. Kiepert ; engr. by L. Lipmann -- [5] Map of northern Palestine and Lebanon : chiefly from the routes of E. Robinson & others / drawn by H. Kiepert ; engrd. by Lipmann -- [6] Map of the peninsula of Mount Sinai and Arabia Petraea : from the itinieraries of E. Robinson and E. Smith / drawn by H. Kiepert ; engrd. by L. Lipmann.
